description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, rectangular structure with a slightly angled upper section housing a display screen. The exterior is predominantly light green with white circuit-like graphics and a glossy finish, giving it a modern, tech-inspired appearance. The front panel includes a large screen area, a control panel below it, and a visible coin slot mechanism. The side panels are decorated with stylized white circuit motifs, adding visual interest and reinforcing the electronic theme. The back of the cabinet is mostly plain and dark, likely for access and ventilation. The overall build suggests a sturdy construction, typical of arcade machines found in public entertainment spaces.
description: A light green arcade game cabinet with white circuit graphics, a large screen, and a coin slot on the front. The sides feature tech-inspired motifs, and the cabinet has a glossy, modern finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, control panel, and coin slot, with circuit graphics and a clear marquee area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled top, green color, and white circuit motif on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, dark back panel, likely for maintenance access.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same green color and white circuit motif.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single control panel with visible button area; specific controls not clearly distinguishable.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present, with a light green background and white circuit-like graphics; no distinct text or imagery.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: White circuit-like graphics on a light green background, creating a tech-inspired theme.
